title: 有馬記念の後に・友を繋ぎし誠は信

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki emerges victorious at this year's
Arima Kinen, but it's Oguri Cap that the audience
is focused on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dubbed the star of the generation, Oguri Cap is
the only name on everyone's lips.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki becomes enraged that no one is
talking about her. She cries that she and the
others who battled for the Classic Triple Crown
are the real stars of the generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She swears to defeat Oguri Cap and prove that
she and her friends are the ones leading this
generation. She now has the piece that she has
been missing—an obsession.
